docs.title: say_hello(name=None)
docs.text:
Generate a friendly greeting string.

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default name str | None

The name of the person to greet. Defaults to None.

None

Returns:

Type Description str

A formatted greeting string.

Source code in src/hello_world/core.py 
def say_hello(name: str | None = None) -> str:
    """Generate a friendly greeting string.

    Args:
        name: The name of the person to greet. Defaults to None.

    Returns:
        A formatted greeting string.
    """
    actual_name = name or "World"
    return f"Hello, {actual_name}!"
